items.title: Token and cost math
items.description: Estimating spend is arithmetic on integers and floats: total_cost = (prompt_tokens + completion_tokens) * price_per_token. Floor division and modulo help batch requests into fixed-size chunks.

items.title: Threshold and range gates
items.description: Comparison operators gate behavior: accept a retrieval hit when score >= 0.8, or validate settings with a chained check like 0 <= temperature <= 2.

items.title: Safe defaults and guards
items.description: Short-circuiting builds robust calls: model = requested or 'gpt-4o', and text = resp and resp.choices[0].message.content avoids indexing a missing response.

items.title: Prompt assembly with f-strings
items.description: f-strings embed expressions directly in text to build prompts and log lines, e.g. f"Summarize in {max_words} words: {document}".

items.title: Streaming loops with the walrus operator
items.description: Reading a token/chunk stream reads cleanly with assignment expressions: while (chunk := stream.read()): handle(chunk).
